loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing KVA, KW, and Current load scores against nameplate ratings; readiness marker and delta omitted as this UPS meter does not measure bypass/mains transfer states.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing output load (active_power_total_kw) and bypass frequency (frequency_hz) trends. Readiness score, bypass voltage, and transfer counts are not measured by this asset's meter and are omitted.
